description: Expanded benign SMS templates for LoRA training. 120 new legitimate Indian SMS spanning banking, delivery, utility, govt, insurance, healthcare, OTP-legit, misc services, and 30 HARD NEGATIVES (legitimate messages that look suspicious at first glance — urgent bank alerts, genuine action-required, real emergency notifications). Disjoint from chakravyuh-bench-v0 test set AND from benign_templates.json (different wording, different transaction IDs, different merchants).
source: hand-written to balance class distribution (was 5.4:1 scam:benign, now ~3.4:1) and reduce false-positive rate on legitimate urgent messages
